LandingPage.metaDescription: Predict World Cup matches with friends — private leagues, live rankings, and AI picks for the 2026 tournament.

hero.tagline: Predict the <wc>World Cup 2026</wc> with your friends
hero.subtitle: Create your private league, submit your predictions for every match, and compete to be #1 in your group.

countdown.urgency: Create your league before the World Cup starts

step1.title: Build your squad
step1.description: Pick a name, customize colors and rules. Your league, your rules!

step2.title: Call your shots
step2.description: Submit your predictions before each match. No pressure, just your football instincts — or peek at probabilities or the model if you want a nudge.

step3.title: Claim the throne
step3.description: Earn points for every correct prediction and climb the ranking. Who'll be the group legend?

leaderboard.title: Live leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Watch rankings update as matches finish.

odds.title: Expert context — check the probabilities before you decide
odds.description: See matchup probabilities at a glance so your gut (and your group chat) has something to argue about.

ai.title: AI as your rival — can you beat the machine?
ai.description: Stack your instincts against model picks and see who comes out looking smart.

groups.title: Public & private groups
groups.description: Invite-only rooms or discover open leagues.

rules.title: Custom scoring rules
rules.description: Tune points for results, exact scores, and bonuses.

mobile.title: Mobile optimized
mobile.description: Predict from the stands or the sofa.

stats.title: 48 nations. One trophy. Endless bragging.
stats.body: For the first time, 48 nations step up. More matches, more banter, more room to prove your friends wrong.

differentiators.title: Not just another prediction platform
differentiators.subtitle: The first prediction platform built as a game.

superpowers.title: Strategic Superpowers
superpowers.description: Double your points with Double Down, spy on your rivals' predictions, or protect yours with Shield. 7 powers per tournament — use them wisely.

album.title: Digital Sticker Album
album.description: Collect all 48 World Cup teams. Bronze, Silver, or Gold based on your accuracy. Can you complete the album?

ai.title: Compete Against the AI
ai.description: An AI player with data-driven predictions. It shows up on your leaderboard as a benchmark. Can you beat the machine?

differentiators.comparison: Other platforms let you predict. <brand>Predibol</brand> lets you <action>play</action>.

cta.title: Who knows football best in your group?
cta.subtitle: There's only one way to find out.

consent.required: You must accept the privacy policy and terms.

AccessCode.confirmOpenSwitch: Are you sure? Anyone with the link will be able to join

Album.title: 🎴 Sticker Album
Album.lockedHint: Earn points on a {team} match to unlock

matches.title: ⚽ Match predictions
matches.description: Points stack up. If you nail the exact score, you earn all three bonuses.
matches.additive: Points are additive: if you get the exact score, you also earn points for correct result and correct goal difference.

result.label: Correct result
result.description: You predict who wins (or a draw).

difference.label: Correct goal difference
difference.description: The margin between goals matches the actual match (e.g. 2-0 and 3-1 both have a difference of 2).

exact.label: Exact score
exact.description: You predict the exact final scoreline.

example.title: 🧮 Interactive example
example.enterPredictionHint: Enter both scores to see how many points you would get.

knockout.title: 🏟️ Knockout stage
knockout.description: In knockout matches, you predict the 90-minute result.
knockout.drawRule: If you predict a draw, you must choose which team advances (extra time / penalties).
knockout.bonus: Bonus: if you correctly predict a draw and the advancing team, you earn {points} extra points.

picks.title: ⭐ Champion & more
picks.description: Before the tournament, you can pick winners in several categories. Points for these categories are awarded at the end of the tournament.

tiebreakers.title: ⚖️ Tiebreakers
tiebreakers.description: If two players have the same total points, ties are broken in this order:

virtualTrader.title: 📈 Simulated P&L
virtualTrader.description: For fun, we calculate a simulated P&L using a €1 notional amount per match (analytics only). You can see it in the "{tab}" tab on the leaderboard.

superpowers.title: ⚡ Superpowers
superpowers.doubleDown: Double your points on a match. Use it on matches where you're most confident.
superpowers.spy: Spy on another player's prediction before the match locks. Careful, they might be shielded!
superpowers.shield: Protect your prediction so no one can spy on it. Use it on matches where you want to keep your strategy secret.
superpowers.note: Superpowers can only be used on matches that aren't locked yet.

album.title: 🎴 Sticker Album
album.description: Every time you earn points on a match, you unlock stickers for both teams that played.
album.upgradeOnly: Stickers only upgrade, never downgrade. Try to get all 48 teams in Gold!
album.compare: You can compare your album with other players in your group.

adminPowers.title: 👑 Admin Powers
adminPowers.enterResults: Enter match results and trigger scoring
adminPowers.pendingPredictions: See which players have pending predictions
adminPowers.accessCode: Manage the group access code (if protected)

Discover.title: Discover Worlds
Discover.subtitle: Find a group and start playing
Discover.noGroups: No public groups yet. Create your own!

create.subtitle: Set up your group scoring and invite your friends.

VirtualBets.disclaimer: 📊 Each finished match uses a €1 notional amount to compute simulated profit and loss. No real money.

helpModal.title: Superpowers
helpModal.doubleDownDescription: Doubles the points you earn (or lose) on this match. Use it when you're confident in your prediction.
helpModal.spyDescription: Peek at another player's prediction before the match locks. But beware — if they used a Shield, you'll see nothing.
helpModal.shieldDescription: Protects your prediction from being spied on. Other players using Spy on you will see 'shielded' instead of your score.

doubleDown.name: x2 Double Down
doubleDown.description: Double your points on this match

Privacy.metaDescription: How Predibol collects, uses, and stores your personal data (GDPR).
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.lawyerNote: Important: Mathias should have a qualified lawyer review this policy before public launch. The text below is plain-language guidance, not legal advice.

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.content:
Predibol is operated by {{Company Name TBD}}, based in {{Location TBD}}.

For privacy questions or requests, contact: {{contact.email@TBD}}.

dataWeCollect.title: What data we collect
dataWeCollect.content:
We collect the following when you use Predibol:

• Email address — account creation, sign-in, and essential emails (e.g. verification).

• Display name — chosen by you; visible to other members of your groups.

• Timezone — so match times can be shown usefully for you.

• Match predictions and pre-tournament picks — your in-game entries.

• Group membership — which groups you belong to and related play data.

• Usage data — pages visited and actions in the app (basic operational needs). Mathias should confirm: we currently describe this as standard web analytics only if that is accurate; if you use none beyond essentials, adjust this bullet.

whyWeCollect.title: Why we collect it (legal basis)
whyWeCollect.content:
We process data on the following bases where applicable:

• Performance of a contract — to run accounts, predictions, groups, and scoring.

• Legitimate interests — security, abuse prevention, and proportionate service improvement; emails strictly related to your account or gameplay where appropriate.

• Consent — marketing communications only if you clearly opt in.

Withdrawing consent may limit optional features; core gameplay may require certain data.

whoWeShare.title: Who we share data with
whoWeShare.content:
Other members of a group can see your display name, predictions, points, and ranking as part of the game.

We use service providers: Supabase (auth/database — {{EU region TBD, e.g. Frankfurt; verify in project}}), Vercel (hosting/CDN), and an email provider such as Resend (transactional mail).

We do not sell personal data. We do not share data with advertisers for tracking or profiling.

whereStored.title: Where data is stored
whereStored.content: Primary data is stored with Supabase. {{Confirm exact region in the Supabase dashboard and replace this sentence.}} The site is delivered via Vercel’s global network, which may route traffic through various locations.

howLong.title: How long we keep data
howLong.content:
We keep account and game data while your account exists.

You can request erasure; we will respond to verifiable requests and delete or anonymise data unless a narrow legal exception applies.

yourRights.title: Your rights (GDPR)
yourRights.content:
If GDPR applies, you may have the right to: access your data; rectify inaccuracies; erase your account and associated data in many cases; receive a portable copy where applicable; object to processing based on legitimate interests; and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

To exercise these rights, contact: {{contact.email@TBD}}.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content:
We use essential cookies/session storage needed for authentication and core site operation.

Mathias should confirm: as of this draft we state there are no advertising cookies and no non-essential analytics cookies — update if you add analytics or marketing scripts.

children.title: Children
children.content: Predibol is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16. If you believe we have, contact us and we will take appropriate steps.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.content: We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be published on this page with an updated date.

Terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the Predibol social prediction game.
Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.lawyerNote: Important: Mathias should have a qualified lawyer review these terms before public launch. This is plain-language guidance, not legal advice.

whatPredibolIs.title: What Predibol is
whatPredibolIs.content:
Predibol is a social prediction game built around the FIFA World Cup 2026. You predict match outcomes, earn points in private or public groups, and compare results with friends.

Predibol is not a gambling or betting platform. No real money is wagered, paid out, or processed through Predibol. Any simulated P&L feature in the product is purely for entertainment and has no monetary value.

The service is provided for entertainment only.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.content:
You must be at least 16 years old to create an account.

You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for activity under your account.

One account per person unless we explicitly allow otherwise in writing.

groups.title: Groups
groups.content:
Group administrators manage membership and settings for their groups within the product.

Predibol does not organise, facilitate, or encourage real-money betting between users. Any private arrangements between group members are solely between those individuals and are outside Predibol’s responsibility.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.content:
You agree not to use offensive display names, harass other users, attempt to disrupt the service, or misuse the platform.

We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or put the community at risk.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.content:
Predibol branding, UI, and original content are owned by {{Company Name TBD}} or its licensors.

FIFA, World Cup marks, team names, and logos belong to their respective owners. Predibol does not claim ownership of third-party marks; they are used for descriptive, informational purposes only.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of liability
limitationOfLiability.content:
Predibol is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent permitted by law.

We are not liable for incorrect match data, scoring or leaderboard errors, downtime, or third-party service outages. Our aggregate liability for claims relating to the free service is limited to zero where no fees are paid; {{adjust if you later charge fees}}.

governingLaw.title: Governing law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of {{Jurisdiction TBD}}, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.

matches.resetConfirm: Reset this match to scheduled? This will clear the score.
